- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
  Summary: File exists and is maintained.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  Summary: Project target confirmed as full-stack React + Node style using Next.js (TypeScript), config-driven runtime, API layer, auth, and PostgreSQL-ready schema.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Summary: Next.js App Router project scaffolded manually in workspace root because directory name prevented create-next-app root init.

- [x] Customize the Project
  Summary: Implemented config-driven runtime with JSON schema validation, dynamic forms, dynamic table, dashboard sections, loading and error states.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  Summary: No required extensions were provided by project setup info.

- [x] Compile the Project
  Summary: Dependencies installed, lint configured, and production build passes successfully.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  Summary: No dedicated VS Code task required because npm scripts cover dev, lint, and build workflows.

- [x] Launch the Project
  Summary: Debug launch not initiated because user did not request a debug session.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  Summary: README and this file are updated to reflect current implementation and usage.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
